creator: timur@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Hi, Eugenie! 

From the described symphoms I suspect there is a bug in the UDF(or maybe MD) 
driver, that gives such a crash. Samba as a user-land application shouldn't 
crash the kernel and if it does - then something is wrong in the kernel. 

It'll be nice to collect kernel backtrace in case of such failure together 
with memory dump. 

With regards, 
Timur
